_meta.source_proposal: ## PROPOSAL 058 · 2026-07-14T04:10:35Z · status: sim-ready (idea-engine control/outbox.md @ main 76aca1e, landed via idea-engine PR #395)
_meta.idea_doc: ideas/venture-lab/rubric-weight-robustness-2026-07-14.md @ idea-engine 76aca1e (blob pin be6e1dd5becbb92e6a8c64c3167912573237a18a in the outbox idea: line)
_meta.harvest_source: venture-lab docs/products/ideas-2026-07-13-night.md blob aa09f12 @ a9e202d69433dc69623a78dd3164ac4689d7c8f0 — re-verified at intake via GitHub MCP get_file_contents at the pinned commit SHA (returned blob SHA aa09f12fd8694ecc1e1e214ac2944482b1e3094f; all seven score rows, the weights line, and the band sentence reproduced verbatim); the runner reads NONE of it
_meta.hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this fixtures.json; zero repo/network reads at verdict time; every registered constant below copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 058 block / idea doc
_meta.rational_encoding: all exact rationals are strings 'num/den' (or integers) parsed to fractions.Fraction

fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C1_uniform_draw: each u_j is generated as (1 - x) + 2*x*rng.random() — exactly ONE core random() call per u_j, 5 per draw in criterion order, so the F6 sentinel counts core random() calls = 5*N per (seed, radius) leg
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C2_band_eval_float: MC band assignment uses float totals with the registered strict/inclusive reading (t < 3 no-build; 3 <= t <= 7/2 borderline; t > 7/2 best); exact-edge float hits are counted by the edge-hit counter (expected 0, measure-zero)
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C3_x_star_edge_set: x*_i = min positive solution in (0, 1) over all 32 vertex sign-patterns and BOTH edges {3, 7/2}, per the block's own specification; the crossed edge and vertex pattern of the minimizing solution are recorded
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C4_stability_ruling: the stability leg re-runs BOTH twin evaluators with p_hat_stab in place of p_hat_main (x* clauses unchanged — Arm A is seedless); it must reproduce the headline class, else the arm-disagreement NULL/INVALID axes apply per the registered order
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C5_dirichlet_draw: Dirichlet reporting worlds draw 5 gammavariate(kappa*w0_j, 1) calls per draw in criterion order via random.Random(20261371); gammavariate CALL count (5 per draw) is the sentinel for these legs — the underlying core-random() consumption of gammavariate is algorithm-internal (rejection sampling) and is not a registered constant
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C6_containment_scope: F4 containment is checked on every sampled per-concept total of every uniform-jitter leg (main + stability, all radii) against Arm A's exact 32-vertex range widened by 1e-9 absolute; Dirichlet legs are a different mechanism (unbounded support) and are registered reporting-only, so F4 does not ride them
fixture_level_choices_disclosed_before_r.C7_report_precision: floats in results.json/stdout are serialized via repr (CPython-deterministic shortest round-trip); exact Fractions as 'num/den' strings

weights_quote: fixed weights: Distribution 35 / Buildability 20 / Launch-effort 15 / Speed 15 / WTP 15

bands.rule: no-build if t < 3; borderline if 3 <= t <= 7/2; best if t > 7/2
bands.band_sentence_quote: below ~3.0 = do not build; 3.0-3.5 = borderline, tight budget only; above 3.5 = best available

jitter.mechanism: radius x; u_j i.i.d. Uniform[1-x, 1+x], j=1..5, one 5-vector per draw; perturbed weights w'_j = w0_j*u_j / sum_k w0_k*u_k; perturbed total t_i(u) = sum_j w'_j*S_ij under the SAME u; flip = the induced band vector differs from B0 in any coordinate

decision_constants.reject_rule: p_hat(1/10) on the main leg >= 1/10 AND x*_1 <= 1/20 AND x*_6 <= 1/20
decision_constants.approve_rule: p_hat(1/10) on the main leg <= 1/20 AND x*_i > 1/20 for ALL seven concepts
decision_constants.evaluation_order: REJECT first, then the INVALID controls gate, then APPROVE, then NULL
null_axes: arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

gates.F1: identity — w0 sums to 1 exactly; the seven recomputed exact totals equal the published Fractions concept-by-concept in table order; baseline band vector equals B0
gates.F2: critical-radius self-consistency — at x*_i - 1/1000 the exact 32-vertex range stays strictly inside the baseline band; at x*_i + 1/1000 the crossed edge lies inside the exact range; probe offset 1/1000 (min x* - 1/1000 = 953/47000 > 0)
gates.F3: zero-flip identity — 1/50 < 1/47 = min_i x*_i (exact comparison recomputed in-sim); EVERY MC leg at x = 1/50 must record exactly zero band changes
gates.F4: containment — every sampled per-concept total at every radius within Arm A's exact 32-vertex range widened by 1e-9 absolute
gates.F6: battery — core-random() draw-count sentinel 5*N per (seed, radius) uniform leg; twin independently-written decision evaluators; stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs (verified externally); CPython minor pinned

dirichlet_reporting_worlds.mechanism: w' ~ Dirichlet(kappa*w0) via random.gammavariate(kappa*w0_j, 1) renormalized; seed 20261371 ONLY; MC only, no exact counterpart, disclosed; never decision-bearing, no agreement gates ride them

drafter_disclosed_reference_never_gated.note: the sim re-derives from scratch and must not trust these; comparison is REPORTED, never gated
